Hero.description: Hello, I am Clinical Psychologist Gökçe Toluç Saklı. I offer evidence-based online psychotherapy to adults, children, and adolescents globally from the US.

About.p1: As an adult, child, and adolescent therapist, I graduated with honors in Psychology from Beykent University and completed my Master's in Clinical Psychology at Istanbul Gelişim University.
About.p2: I gained extensive clinical experience at Bakırköy Mazhar Osman Psychiatric Hospital and Beylikdüzü State Hospital. After working in private clinics and serving 4 years at Çatalca Municipality, I relocated to the US.
About.p3: Using Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT), certified by Prof. Dr. Ebru Şalcıoğlu, I now provide online therapy globally. I also presented my thesis at the 12th International Paris Congress on Social Sciences and Humanities.
About.card1Desc: Years of public and private clinical experience, including Bakırköy Mazhar Osman Psychiatric Hospital and Çatalca Municipality.
About.card2Desc: Honors degree, Master's in Clinical Psychology, and certified expertise in Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT).
About.card3Desc: Online therapy accessible from anywhere in the world, dedicated to adults, children, and adolescents.

Services.title: Services & Expertise
Services.description: My primary areas of expertise include anxiety, social phobia, depression, OCD, trauma, and relationship dynamics.
Services.s1Desc: Professional support in individual processes using CBT-focused approaches to overcome emotional and cognitive challenges.
Services.s2Desc: Development-oriented therapy support for the emotional processes of children and youth, including family participation.
Services.s3Desc: Guidance service for communication issues in relationships, trust building, and healthy bonding processes.
Services.s4Desc: The opportunity to attend uninterrupted professional therapy sessions from your own safe space, globally from the US.

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.description: Here you can find answers to basic questions about the therapy process.
FAQ.q1: How long do the sessions last?
FAQ.a1: Our individual therapy sessions standardly last for 50 minutes.
FAQ.q2: Is online therapy as effective as in-person therapy?
FAQ.a2: Yes, scientific research shows that online therapy is as effective as in-person therapy in many cases.
FAQ.q3: How long should I continue therapy?
FAQ.a3: The therapy process varies completely based on individual needs.
FAQ.q4: How does the privacy policy work?
FAQ.a4: Due to ethical rules, all information you share is kept strictly confidential.

Quote.text: The courage to meet your own darkness in a safe space is where healing begins.
Quote.author: Gökçe Toluç Saklı, MSc

Gallery.title: Trainings & Workshops
Gallery.description: Corporate trainings and workshops focused on experience sharing.
Gallery.g5Desc: Interactive presentations organized for institutions and groups to support community mental health and share clinical experiences.
